description:
## Deep Component Audit ‚Äî hx-divider

**Component directory:** `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-divider/`

### wc-mcp Tools ‚Äî USE THESE FOR SCORING
- `score_component`, `get_component`, `analyze_accessibility`, `validate_usage`, `list_css_parts`, `get_design_tokens`
- **Report any wc-mcp bugs to `/Volumes/Development/booked/wc-tools` board.**

### Audit Scope
1. **Design Tokens** ‚Äî `--hx-` tokens. Color, thickness, spacing. Dark mode.
2. **Accessibility** ‚Äî WCAG 2.1 AA. role="separator". aria-orientation. Decorative vs semantic.
3. **Functionality** ‚Äî Horizontal/vertical. Thickness variants. With label/text. Spacing.
4. **TypeScript** ‚Äî Strict. No `any`.
5. **CSS/Styling** ‚Äî Shadow DOM. CSS Parts. Flexible width/height.
6. **CEM Accuracy** ‚Äî All API documented.
7. **Tests** ‚Äî 80%+ coverage. Orientation. Label. ARIA.
8. **Storybook** ‚Äî Horizontal/vertical. With text. Spacing variants.
9. **Drupal Compatibility** ‚Äî Twig-friendly.
10. **Portability** ‚Äî CDN-ready.

### Deliverable
Detailed audit report. Fix CRITICAL+HIGH. Document rest.
title: Deep Audit v2: hx-divider
